chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No. S – 46 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections 2. For orders on MA No.390/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 14.12.2023 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State <><><><>..<><><><> Mr. Faiz Muhammad Brohi, Advocate, has filed vakalatnama on behalf of the applicant. It is taken on record. At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that he would not press the disposal of instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application before this Court on merits, provided the disposal of said FIR is converted from ‘B’ to ‘C’ class, which is not opposed by learned DPG for the State. Order accordingly. Judge ARBROHI
